title: Change website name to Crown Followers

requirements.summary: Update the website name to 'Crown Followers' in the browser tab title and all visible brand text locations (Header logo and Footer brand name)
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Crown Followers' as the page title
The Header component logo/brand text reads 'Crown Followers'
The Footer component brand name reads 'Crown Followers'
No other content, styling, or functionality is changed

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag to display 'Crown Followers' so the browser tab shows the new website name
Change the logo/brand text in the Header component to read 'Crown Followers' instead of the current brand name
Update the brand name text in the Footer component to display 'Crown Followers' instead of the current brand name
